objective: Discover and validate volume/microstructure entry filter for BTC H4 trend-following

constraints.entry_base: EMA(30) cross above EMA(120) on H4 close
constraints.exit: ATR trailing stop or EMA cross-down (fixed, not modified)

figures: Fig06a/b/c: TBR vs forward returns scatter
Fig09: Volume profile around entry (W vs L)
Fig10: TBR profile around entry (W vs L)
Fig11: Volatility profile around entry (W vs L)
Fig12: VDO histogram at entry (W vs L)
Fig13: VDO vs net return scatter
tables: Tbl05: Entry bar feature separation tests
observations: Obs01: TBR contemporaneous, not predictive (Fig04, Tbl01)
Obs02: TBR moderate ACF, slow decay (Fig05)
Obs03: TBR→fwd return near zero all horizons (Tbl02)
Obs04: TBR→fwd return sign weakly negative (Tbl02)
Obs05: Volume higher during strong moves both dirs (Fig03, Tbl01)
Obs06: TBR distribution shape varies yearly (Fig02)
Obs07: Rolling TBR→fwd return non-stationary, oscillates (Fig08)
Obs08: Regime conditioning does not improve TBR (Fig07, Tbl03)
Obs09: H4 returns near-zero ACF (Fig05)
Obs10: Data quality high (00_data_audit.md)
Obs11: Volume does NOT differentiate up vs down (Fig03, Tbl01) [NON-FINDING]
Obs12: TBR no predictive power at t+24 (Tbl02) [NON-FINDING]
Obs13: Weak negative TBR→fwd possibly spurious (Fig08, Tbl02) [SPURIOUS?]
Obs14: Regime difference at t+24 likely noise (Fig07, Tbl03) [SPURIOUS?]
Obs15: Volume profile identical W vs L (Fig09)
Obs16: TBR profile identical W vs L (Fig10)
Obs17: All 5 features fail at entry bar, p>0.39 (Tbl05)
Obs18: VDO marginal p=0.086, r_rb=0.144 (Tbl06)
Obs19: Volatility gap persistent, not entry-localized (Fig11, Tbl05)
Obs20: Winners hold 3.5x longer (Tbl04) [OUTCOME, not predictor]
Obs21: Pre-entry TBR rise is mechanical (Fig10, Obs01)
Obs22: 91% trail stop exits (Tbl04)
Obs23: Worst losers show no common volume/TBR pattern (Fig14a-e)
Obs24: VDO clusters just above zero (Fig12, Fig13)
Obs25: VDO slightly favors winners [VISUALLY TEMPTING, WEAK] (Fig12, Tbl06)
Obs26: Volatility gap [VISUALLY TEMPTING, WEAK] (Fig11, Tbl05)
propositions: Prop01: Volume/TBR no incremental info | HIGH | Obs15,Obs16,Obs17
Prop02: VDO marginal signal likely floor artifact | MEDIUM | Obs18,Obs24,Obs25
Prop03: Pre-entry TBR rise is mechanical, info-free | HIGH | Obs21,Obs01,Obs16
Prop04: TBR predictive content non-stationary, negligible | HIGH | Obs03,Obs04,Obs07,Obs13
Prop05: Volume symmetric up/down, uninformative for long-only | HIGH | Obs05,Obs11,Obs15,Obs17
Prop06: Volatility gap is regime property, not entry feature | MED-HIGH | Obs19,Obs26,Tbl05
